posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran has begun imposing "transit fees" on some commercial vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz, per Bloomberg.

Payments of as much as $2 million per voyage are being sought on an adhoc basis.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
